creator: tony@git-pull.com
text:
(In reply to Maxim Filimonov from comment #4)

Here is what I got when I tried it again.

tony at z600 in ~/work/ports/deskutils/py-khal (head:391832) 
$ patch -p0 < ~/work/patches/py-khal-201464.txt
Hmm...  Looks like a unified diff to me...
The text leading up to this was:
--------------------------
|Index: Makefile
|===================================================================
|--- Makefile	(revision 391725)
|+++ Makefile	(working copy)
--------------------------
Patching file Makefile using Plan A...
Reversed (or previously applied) patch detected!  Assume -R? [y] 
Hunk #1 succeeded at 2 with fuzz 1 (offset 1 line).
Hunk #2 failed at 15.
1 out of 2 hunks failed--saving rejects to Makefile.rej
done
